# sDOLA Earn

> Earn stable yield on your stablecoins with sDOLA, an ERC-4626 tokenized vault by Inverse Finance on Ethereum.

## What is sDOLA?

sDOLA is a yield-bearing token that represents staked DOLA in an ERC-4626 vault. Users deposit DOLA (or convert other supported tokens like USDC, USDT, DAI, FRAX) and receive sDOLA, which continuously accrues yield. The vault auto-compounds rewards, so the value of sDOLA relative to DOLA increases over time.

## Key Features

- **ERC-4626 Vault**: Industry-standard tokenized vault for composability across DeFi
- **Auto-compounding yield**: Rewards accrue automatically, no manual claiming required
- **Multi-token deposits**: Deposit DOLA directly, or zap in from USDC, USDT, DAI, FRAX, and other supported tokens via Enso
- **Real-time earnings**: sDOLA balance shows accrued DOLA earnings in real time
- **Non-custodial**: Users retain full control of their funds via smart contracts on Ethereum

## Contracts

- **sDOLA (vault)**: ERC-4626 vault token on Ethereum mainnet
- **DOLA**: Underlying stablecoin by Inverse Finance

## How It Works

1. Connect an Ethereum wallet
2. Choose a token to deposit (DOLA, USDC, USDT, DAI, FRAX, etc.)
3. Approve and deposit — receive sDOLA in return
4. sDOLA accrues yield automatically
5. Withdraw at any time to redeem sDOLA for DOLA (or zap out to other tokens)

## Links

- Website: https://earn.inverse.finance
- Inverse Finance: https://www.inverse.finance
- Docs: https://docs.inverse.finance
- Stablecoin Comparator: https://www.stableyields.info
- DOLA Staking API: https://www.inverse.finance/api/dola-staking

## Stats

Live APY, projected APY, and TVL are available on the website and via the DOLA staking API.
